title: toona ciliata var. parviflora
intro: Toona ciliata var. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered toona, is a variety of the Toona ciliata tree, native to Australia and New Guinea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Toona ciliata var. parviflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
